name: Gianni Infantino
quote: Iran is coming for sure. [CNBC Invest in America Forum, April 2026] I was there watching them play in Antalya — they are a very strong team. We are committed to ensuring the best possible conditions for their participation at the World Cup.

name: Donald Trump
role: President of the United States (Host Nation)
quote: The Iran National Soccer Team is welcome to The World Cup, but I really don't believe it is appropriate that they be there, for their own life and safety.

name: Claudia Sheinbaum
quote: Mexico would be open to hosting Iran's World Cup matches if FIFA decides to relocate them. We are a welcoming country and we want all nations to be able to participate in this tournament.

name: Mark Carney
quote: It is the number one sport for Canadian boys and girls. Two-thirds of the country watched the last World Cup and we are partnered with the United States and Mexico, welcoming the world.

name: Victor Montagliani
quote: The 2026 World Cup in North America will be the most transformational event in the history of our confederation. We are ready to show the world what this region can do.

name: Cindy Parlow Cone
quote: The World Cup coming to the United States is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to grow the game across our country. Our federation has never been better prepared.

name: Mauricio Pochettino
quote: The Belgium and Portugal results gave us clear information about what we need to fix. We are 70 days out. The roster announcement is May 26 and we will be ready. The World Cup is a completely different environment from a friendly.

name: Jesús Gutiérrez
quote: We are committed to delivering a world-class experience for all fans. Mexico has hosted the World Cup twice and we know what it takes to do it right.

name: Nick Bontis
quote: This World Cup will be a transformational moment for football in Canada, inspiring the next generation of players and proving that Canada belongs on the world stage.

name: Jamil Dakwar
role: ACLU Human Rights Director (Civil Liberties Advocate)
quote: With less than 100 days until kick-off, the escalating attacks on immigrants in the United States, lack of clear safeguards at stadiums against abusive federal immigration enforcement, and FIFA's cancellation of anti-discrimination messaging signal a tournament heading in the wrong direction.

name: Lionel Messi
role: Argentina Captain / Inter Miami CF Forward (Decision Pending)
quote: I hope I can be there. I've said before that I'd love to be there. At worst, I'll be there watching it live, but it will be special. The World Cup is special for everyone — especially for us, because we live it in a completely different way.

name: Kylian Mbappé
quote: France comes with the ambition to win. We have a complete squad, experienced players, and the hunger to bring the trophy back to Paris.

name: Lionel Scaloni
quote: Messi will take this time calmly before making a final decision. He always tells me that he would like me to be there in any role. We have a relationship of great trust and we can talk about everything.

name: Thomas Tuchel
quote: We have a young, talented squad. This World Cup gives us the opportunity to finally bring football home, and I believe this group has what it takes.

name: Didier Deschamps
quote: We prepare meticulously for every tournament. The expanded format changes some dynamics, but France's goal is always the same: to win.

name: Mehdi Taj
quote: The presence of national and club teams in countries that are considered hostile and are unable to ensure the security of Iranian athletes and team members is prohibited until further notice. [Iran Sports Ministry, March 27, 2026]

name: Ahmad Donyamali
role: Iran Minister of Sport and Youth
quote: We have to be ready, but maybe the decision is not to go. [April 21, 2026] The final decision rests with the government and the Supreme National Security Council. Note: government spokesperson Mohajerani stated April 23 Iran is 'fully prepared for the team's effective participation' — contradicting Donyamali's April 21 language and reflecting the fragmented institutional messaging 7 days before the April 30 FIFA Congress in Vancouver.

name: Timothy Weah
quote: The ticket prices are too expensive. Lots of real fans will miss matches. Football should still be enjoyed by everyone.

name: Christian Pulisic
quote: I think you could say so — this is the strongest squad I've been part of. Looking at the guys playing at the highest levels and doing extremely well at their clubs, you have a really, really strong squad and depth as well. Multiple guys that can play in every position. The team's in a good place. People should be excited and hopefully ready to cheer us on. [April 21, 2026, Reuters]
